description_long: This is a modern, tactical-style rifle with a distinctive cylindrical drum magazine located beneath the receiver, suggesting a high ammunition capacity. The body is primarily matte black with a striking overlay of red and orange flame-like patterns, giving it a visually aggressive appearance. The rifle features a straight, tubular barrel and a fixed stock integrated into the main body, with a prominent pistol grip for ergonomic handling. There are two simple iron sights mounted along the top rail, one near the muzzle and one at the rear, for basic aiming. The muzzle end appears to have a short, unadorned barrel with no visible suppressor or compensator. The overall construction suggests a robust, metal-dominated build, suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A black tactical rifle with a drum magazine and red-orange flame patterns, featuring iron sights and a fixed stock.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, the drum magazine, pistol grip, and flame-patterned body.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular drum magazine and the alignment of the barrel and iron sights.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the first, with clear visibility of the magazine and stock details.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the stock and the drum magazine's width.
